methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Blitzpanel is a pre-seed stage robotics and manufacturing company operating within a sector populated by 9 comparable peers: 1 public company (ticker 277810.KQ) and 8 private firms including 1X Technologies, Divergent, Exotec, Locus Robotics, and Bedrock Robotics. The company currently has no disclosed valuation or fundraising amount on record.

Standard peer-median valuation methodology is not applicable to Blitzpanel at this stage. The robotics and manufacturing sector contains 11 same-sector peers overall, but filtering for stage-aligned comparables (same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier companies) yields fewer than three datapoints in any single filter category. Applying an all-sector median would introduce substantial distortion given the wide dispersion in maturity and capital efficiency across the robotics landscape. Consequently, no triangulated valuation range can be supported by the quantitative data available.

Valuation of Blitzpanel at pre-seed stage depends critically on founder track record, technical differentiation within the robotics subsector, and capital efficiency relative to the reference cohort. Without disclosed fundraising history, current metrics, or stage-appropriate peer valuations, this analysis cannot generate a defensible range. The path forward requires either: closer specification of Blitzpanel's robotics subsector (e.g., industrial automation vs. logistics vs. humanoid), or access to recent rounds for stage-adjacent private peers to establish meaningful valuation anchors.
